name: Jerusalem
subtitle: Culture, history & hidden gems
heroLabel: old stone streets, rooftop views, meaningful Shabbat tables
description: A grounded guide to Jerusalem through food, history, community, learning, and quieter local details beyond the obvious tourist path.

sections.title: Start with a neighborhood, not a checklist
sections.body: Choose one area and move slowly. Jerusalem is better when the day has room for wandering, conversations, and small discoveries.

sections.title: Shabbat rhythm
sections.body: Plan meals, walking distance, and community contacts before the city shuts down. Leave Friday afternoon intentionally light.

sections.title: Local note
sections.body: Ask people where they actually go, not only what appears on travel lists. The best recommendations often come from a friend of a friend.

places.name: Kosher food cluster
places.note: Build this out with your favorite restaurants and price notes.

places.name: Host / meal options
places.note: Add vetted hosts, shuls, or community dinner notes.

places.name: Walking-friendly plan
places.note: Add neighborhood walking routes and taxi/transport notes.

name: Montreal
subtitle: Kosher life, winter charm & cross-border community
heroLabel: bagels, old streets, warm homes, French-English community
description: A guide for travelers moving between Montreal, Ottawa, Albany, New York, and the wider Northeast Jewish network.

sections.title: A natural Hamsa Nomads hub
sections.body: Montreal works well as a bridge between French-speaking Jewish life, student networks, young professionals, and Northeast travel.

sections.title: Food and neighborhood notes
sections.body: Use this section for kosher restaurants, bakeries, grocery spots, eruv notes, and what is easiest without a car.

sections.title: Community angle
sections.body: Frame Montreal as part of the bigger cross-border circle, not just a destination.

places.name: Kosher staples
places.note: Add bakeries, restaurants, and Shabbat prep notes.

places.name: Young adult networks
places.note: Add orgs, events, WhatsApp leads, and contact rules.

places.name: Cross-border travel
places.note: Add bus, train, carpool, and border notes.

name: New York City
subtitle: Young Jewish life, food, events & movement
heroLabel: subways, packed tables, late-night events, neighborhood energy
description: A practical city guide for young Jewish travelers looking for kosher food, Shabbat options, meetups, and real social entry points.

sections.title: Use neighborhoods as chapters
sections.body: Separate Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Five Towns, and nearby suburbs so the guide does not become overwhelming.

sections.title: Events first
sections.body: For NYC, a live/upcoming events section may be more valuable than a static tourist guide.

sections.title: Trust matters
sections.body: Keep group links, hosts, and private community contacts reviewed rather than fully open.

places.name: Young adult calendar
places.note: Add live events, recurring meetups, and community organizers.

places.name: Kosher map
places.note: Add restaurants by neighborhood and late-night options.

places.name: Meal pathways
places.note: Add official programs, hosts, and safe request process.

name: Lisbon
subtitle: Jewish heritage, ocean air & slow travel
heroLabel: tiles, hills, ocean light, Jewish memory, quiet routes
description: A softer travel guide for Jewish heritage, local tips, and thoughtful wandering through Lisbon and nearby Portugal routes.

sections.title: Heritage without rushing
sections.body: Make room for context, memory, and place. This page can become a beautiful editorial guide, not just logistics.

sections.title: Practical notes
sections.body: Add kosher availability, Shabbat feasibility, walking routes, and where community is accessible.

sections.title: Nomad layer
sections.body: Connect Lisbon to broader Europe travel and Jewish travelers looking for community on the road.

places.name: Jewish history route
places.note: Add museums, neighborhoods, and contextual stops.

places.name: Kosher planning
places.note: Add what is easy, what needs advance planning, and grocery notes.

places.name: Day trips
places.note: Add Sintra, coast, and other relevant routes.
